aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会维持震荡走势。
【关键位置】
当前价格77,720美元附近存在一定支撑。
【短线策略】
可以考虑在77,500美元附近买入，目标位78,500美元。
【风险提醒】
需注意恐慌贪婪指数较低，可能会有较大波动风险。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may maintain a fluctuating trend in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
Current price around $77,720 has some support.
[Outlook]
Consider buying around $77,500, targeting $78,500.
[Reminder]
Note that the fear and greed index is relatively low, and there may be a risk of large fluctuations.
